ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., bowler, batsman) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled */,
  "maidens" REAL /* Number of maidens */,
  "runs" REAL /* Number of runs conceded */,
  "wickets" REAL /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "average" REAL /* Average performance */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player (if a batsman) */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player (if a batsman) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player (if a batsman) */,
  "fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of fielding dismissals (e.g., catches, run-outs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures */,
  "highest_score" REAL /* Highest score */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "career_span" TEXT /* Player's career span (e.g., 2010-2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match is scheduled */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scheduling_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scheduling_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scheduling_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_score" REAL /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" REAL /* Score of the second team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_man_of_the_match FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view profile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
